final:
module lfsr (
    input clk,
    input reset,
    output reg [4:0] lfsr_out
);
    wire obf_feedback;

    assign obf_feedback = lfsr_out[4] ^ lfsr_out[1]; // x^5 + x^2 + 1 obf_feedback

    always @(posedge clk or posedge reset) begin
        if (reset) begin
            lfsr_out <= 5'b00001; // Initial seed value
        end else begin
            lfsr_out <= {lfsr_out[3:0], obf_feedback}; // Shift left and insert obf_feedback
        end
    end
endmodule
